title: Terraria's Paper Airplanes
body:
# Terrarias paper Airplabes: What does it do?
Simpe, it's self-explanatory. It adds the paper airplane items from terraria, with slightly revamped textures. These airplanes are fully-functional and avaliable for in survival and crative. You craft them with 6 paper, which makes 5 of them. Have fun!


# Q&A
Q: Will this be ported to a different version?
A:No, but you are free to do so as long as you give credit on the page
